name: wall_clock_clean_baseline
goal: Measure real latency breakdown after cleaning repo issues

name: packet_size_frame_scheduler
goal: Skip trivial frames before full decode/encode using frame type and packet size

name: changed_query_attention_sim
goal: Let changed tokens query broadly while static tokens become memory

name: global_stabilization_cache
goal: Recover same-position cache validity under egomotion via affine/homography stabilization

name: lowres_plus_roi_refinement
goal: Run low-res global frames with high-res changed or important crops

name: luma_chroma_task_policy
goal: Make color handling task-aware rather than uniform RGB

name: multi_reference_cache
goal: Allow reuse from more than the immediately previous frame
success: improved robustness on occlusion and B-frame structures

name: screen_content_path
goal: Specialize for slides/UI/code via copy, palette, and text-aware heuristics
success: better performance on screen-video without dense natural-image pipeline

name: qwen_layer_segment_cache
goal: Exploit Qwen local/full-attention alternation for layer-segmented caching
success: partial layer reuse with minimal drift

name: tiny_recache_gate
goal: Train a lightweight gate to predict refresh risk from cheap signals
success: better accuracy-speed tradeoff than fixed thresholds
